cedict_en: to promote to a higher job/to select for promotion
to extract (ore, minerals etc)/to refine/to purify/to process
to point out/to remind (sb of sth)/to suggest/suggestion/tip/reminder/notice
to propose; to suggest; proposal; suggestion
to excavate; (lit and fig.) to unearth; to dig into
expression or emotion showing in one's eyes/meaningful glance/wink/eyesight (dialect)
to meet with; to encounter (esp. misfortune or hardship)/an experience (esp. adverse)
to waste; to spoil/to ruin; to wreck/to insult; to humiliate/to defile (a woman); to rape/also pr. [zao1ta5]
